title: Two-barrier stress test design correctly eliminates race conditions
description: relay/tests/stress.rs uses two Barriers: (1) start_barrier: no client sends until all N have received DirectoryList, making 'received == sent*(N-1)' exact. (2) done_barrier: no client drains until all N finish sending, preventing the race where a late message arrives after a peer's drain window closes. A contributor might suggest collapsing to one barrier or using a sleep. Do not do that. The two-barrier design was specifically added after a first run showed missing messages from low-jitter clients that sent before all N were connected. Both barriers are load-bearing.
close_reason: informational review note — design confirmed correct, no action needed
